sglang.title: [Fix] Suppress dynamo logging when using flashinfer backend with torch compile
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently when using flashinfer backend (v0.2.5) with enable-torch-compile, the program can run well, but there will be some annoying logs from torch dynamo:

This PR removes these logs by manually setting the logging level of torch dynamo.
Reproducing:
python3 -m sglang.launch_server --m

sglang.title: [Minor] Fix duplicate method definitions in conversation.py
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Minor typos in the code: the same method name was defined twice mistakenly. Not affecting behavior as the method is registered via decorator and never referenced by name.

Modifications
Rename based on function behavior

sglang.title: Fix flaky issues of lora and add multi batch tests
sglang.author: Qiaolin-Yu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently, lora will produce flaky issues (Triton kernel invalid memory access in the prefill stage) after running multiple batches. This PR aims to fix the issue and add related tests (multi batch tests for lora, mixing different lora adapters and None).
Modifications

Make the lora man

sglang.title: fix: fix broadcast_pyobj breaking VerlEngine
sglang.author: ocss884
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fix verl-project/verl#1368
In the PP PR #5724 broadcast_pyobj function changed its condition from judging rank==0 (if rank is local rank 0 of the passing ProcessGroup) to rank==src (if rank is global rank src), which breaks VerlEngine's broadcast logic when dp>1 and tp>1.

Modifications

sglang.title: [PD] Allow customizing reserved tokens to avoid KV cache waste
sglang.author: fzyzcjy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Extracted from #5524.
Example use case: when benchmarking 2000in 100out 256seq, the KV cache is almost full. If we use the default 512 reserved tokens, each sequence will roughly occupy 2000+512 tokens in KV cache, and thus we cannot test 256 seq.
For real world case, I guess it may be he

sglang.title: Update dev container config to support live code sync and improve docker setup guide
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Current dev container configuration does not configure workspace, leaving the local repo to be synced to the default location (/workspaces/sglang) instead of the path where the sglang package is pip installed from (/sgl-workspace/sglang).

vllm.title: [Build/CI] Upgrade CUTLASS to 3.9.2
vllm.author: tlrmchlsmth
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Upgrade CUTLASS again, since there is a new release fixing a hang issue:

Fixed Blockwise and Groupwise GEMM hang issue when problem size K is 128.

Release notes:
https://github.com/NVIDIA/cutlass/releases/tag/v3.9.2
